response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content, identifying two distinct musical performances and one transitional segment. 2. Identified the first song as 'BAD HATTER' by DYES IWASAKI feat. Lily Mizusaki based on on-screen text. Searched for lyrics using those terms. 3. Identified the second song as 'ナンセンス' (Nonsense). On-screen credits indicated writers Takuma Ohara and Shintaro Namioka, which helped confirm the song by Penthouse. Searched for lyrics matching the writers and title. 4. Created scene segments based on timestamps. 5. Compiled the data into the required JSON format, ensuring lyrics were fully captured and escaped correctly, with the last scene adjusted to the video duration.
response.global_summary: A performance video featuring a VTuber (implied to be Aohashi from the hashtag #あおはしの生誕祭2026) performing two songs: 'BAD HATTER' by DYES IWASAKI feat. Lily Mizusaki and 'ナンセンス' (Nonsense) by Penthouse.

scenes.description: The performance of 'BAD HATTER'. The VTuber is on stage with masked dancers, performing a choreographed routine. Text 'BAD HATTER' and 'BANCHO CABARET' appear on screen.

Sweetie night in Mary Jane
Heels kankan tap temple hall
Secret sign, behold, an invitation
Navigate with a stylish hat and stick
Step inside, gonna lunatic
Already lifting spirits, gravy sauce
Come on, let's toast to Billie Jean
Now let's drown in this desire
If it's finite, before the night breaks
We should savor it until the end

You are "BAD HATTER"
Dear monster
We are "BAD HATTER"
Fame and charges are nonsense
Bump! Bump! Moon night
Traffic jam on the dance floor
We are "stakeholder"
Dance drunk in the frenzy

Bloody Sam and aviation
Gold, silver, bronze always flying in the air
In the venue, it's equality
Old and young, deceiving and talking to each other
Step inside, gonna lunatic
Everyone is whispering crazy talk
How about joining me, miss?
Shall we dance with the gentleman with horns?
Whether it's a ghost or what they look like
I don't have time to worry about it

You are "BAD HATTER"
Dear monster
We are "BAD HATTER"

Bump! Bump! Moon night

scenes.description: A short transitional scene where the VTuber and a chibi version of herself appear on a city street at night. No vocal music is playing.
The performance of 'ナンセンス' (Nonsense). The VTuber sings and dances against a backdrop of silhouettes. On-screen text credits the songwriters.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
No thank you, alright?
Carefree, I'm losing my mind
"Inappropriate", "Be low-profile to criticism"
Justice done freely, Mr. X is setting fires
"Truth unknown" - that's not sane
Night is on and on and on
We're drinking up our grudges and getting smashed
For the eyes? For the teeth? It's easy, inhale and exhale, judgment
Finally, tonight, everything goes
Everyone is nonsense, very nonsense
Don't be cocky, shut up, shut up
This world is nonsense, I'm truly sorry
Too bad, you poor thing, poor thing, it can't be helped
Come on, try your best and go
Then, give my regards to Enma

Selling megaphones
"Even if the owner is unknown, thank you for your business"
